### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25459, close #25692, close #25455 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: planner: fix some unstable prepare-cache test cases

### What is changed and how it works?

These goroutine leak problems are probably fixed by https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/26500, so open them again.

- [x] Unit test
